recommendations.title: Kidnapped
recommendations.overview: Three hooded Eastern-European criminals burst into a home in a Madrid gated community, holding the family hostage in its own home, and forcing the father to empty his credit cards. But the family fights back - brutally.

recommendations.title: Inside
recommendations.overview: Completely on her own, Sarah spends her time at home, waiting for the approaching birth of her child. But one night, a stranger breaks into her home, ready to snatch her still unborn baby from her.

recommendations.title: Your Son
recommendations.overview: Jaime, a doctor who lives in Seville, finds his life radically changed when his son is left fighting for his life after being beaten up during a robbery. The feelings of pain and helplessness soon change to feelings of hate and anger, converting a go

recommendations.title: The Wandering Earth II
recommendations.overview: Humans built huge engines on the surface of the earth to find a new home. But the road to the universe is perilous. In order to save earth, young people once again have to step forward to start a race against time for life and death.

recommendations.title: Man of Steel
recommendations.overview: A young boy learns that he has extraordinary powers and is not of this earth. As a young man, he journeys to discover where he came from and what he was sent here to do. But the hero in him must emerge if he is to save the world from annihilation and

recommendations.title: A Quiet Place: Day One
recommendations.overview: As New York City is invaded by alien creatures who hunt by sound, a woman named Sam fights to survive with her cat.

recommendations.title: The Lost World
recommendations.genres: Adventure, Fantasy, Drama, Romance, Horror, Science Fiction, Thriller
recommendations.overview: The first film adaptation of Sir Arthur Conan Doyle's classic novel about a land where prehistoric creatures still roam.

recommendations.title: Assimilate
recommendations.overview: Three friends making a web series about their town discover that their neighbors are being killed and replaced by creatures who are perfect copies of their victims.

recommendations.title: Against the Dark
recommendations.overview: When most of the population of Earth is infected by a virus and transformed into flesh eaters and blood drinking creatures, a group of hunters lead by Tao and his sword chase the vampire zombies to eliminate them. Six non-infected survivors try to fi

recommendations.title: Deathstroke: Knights & Dragons - The Movie
recommendations.overview: The assassin Deathstroke tries to save his family from the wrath of H.I.V.E. and the murderous Jackal.
